body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #504

as of 16 Nov, the reserved CliMA GPU node is back in action, so the segmentation faults are coming up again (e.g. [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacoupler-ci/builds/2114#018bd999-1b8c-422e-b5d6-066410d79cd8))

also updates for Aqua.jl v0.8 and adds a compat entry for it
title: cuda driver, aqua fixes
